title: SPAIN enforcement action against RESIDENCIAL ETXE-LAN, S.L. (1,800)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,800 on RESIDENCIAL ETXE-LAN, S.L. The DPA has launched an investigation into the controller for a potential breach of the GDPR. The DPA has repeatedly requested information from the controller, who has failed to respond.
